---
title: "Blog"
description: "Latest analytics and R writing from Viswadutt Poduri."
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# Blog

Stay current with the latest analytics, modeling, and reproducible workflow posts.

## Featured posts

- [Loan vs FD](Loan_vs_FD/)
  A practical breakdown of loan vs fixed deposit comparisons and why risk matters.

- [Monty Hall Problem](Monty_Hall/)
  A simulation-backed explanation of why switching doors improves your odds.

- [Binomial Standard Error](Binomial_Standard_Error/)
  A concise guide to interpreting uncertainty in probability estimates.

- [useR 2025](useR_2025/)
  Notes and takeaways from the useR 2025 conference.
